text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainian drones targeted a high rise building in Russia's Yekaterinburg this Saturday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 本周六上午，乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯叶卡捷琳堡的一栋高层建筑。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Iranian Defence Ministry spokesperson Sadar Talaee-Nik reports that a significant portion of the country’s missile capabilities remains unused, claiming that Iran’s armed forces controlled the skies over the Israel until the moment before the ceasefire. he added that Iran currently produces more than 1,000 types of weapons domestically, including missiles, drones, defence systems and other military equipment, with around 9,000 companies cooperating with Iran’s armed forces and Defence Ministry. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 伊朗国防部发言人萨达尔·塔莱-尼克（Sadar Talaee-Nik）报告称，该国大部分导弹能力尚未动用，并声称伊朗武装部队在停火前一刻一直控制着以色列上空。他补充说，伊朗目前在国内生产超过1000种武器，包括导弹、无人机、防御系统和其他军事装备，约有9000家公司与伊朗武装部队和国防部开展合作。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Two columns of fire engulf the early morning skyline in Dnipro this Saturday. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Additional footage and photos of massive fires in Dnipro after several Russian missiles struck the regional capital city this early Saturday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺本周六清晨，两道火柱吞噬了第聂伯罗的天际线。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 本周六清晨，在几枚俄罗斯导弹袭击该地区首府城市后，第聂伯罗发生大火的更多视频和照片。@wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 The second phase of Operation “Epic Fury” will focus on restoring the functioning of the Strait of Hormuz. To achieve this objective, the U.S. military has deployed a significant number of combat aircraft to the Middle East. These include 12 F/A-18C/D fighters from the U.S. Marine Corps’ VMFA-312 squadron, 30 A-10C+ Thunderbolt II attack aircraft from the U.S. Air Force and Air National Guard’s 74th, 75th, 107th, and 190th fighter squadrons, as well as six AC-130J gunships and numerous other assets stationed at Al Dhafra and Prince Sultan Air Bases. Most of these fighters and drones are intended to provide close air support to U.S. Navy and Marine Corps forces involved in potential ground operations, including any attempts to seize islands under Iranian control. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 “史诗之怒”行动的第二阶段将重点恢复霍尔木兹海峡的运作。为实现这一目标，美军已向中东部署了大量作战飞机。其中包括来自美国海军陆战队 VMFA-312 中队的 12 架 F/A-18C/D 战斗机，来自美国空军和空军国民警卫队第 74、75、107 和 190 战斗机中队的 30 架 A-10C+“雷电 II”攻击机，以及 6 架 AC-130J 空中炮艇和驻扎在阿尔达夫拉空军基地和苏丹王子空军基地的众多其他资产。这些战斗机和无人机大多旨在为参与潜在地面行动的美国海军和海军陆战队提供近距离空中支援，包括任何夺取伊朗控制岛屿的企图。推文

text: WarMonitor D.C. officials mistakenly displayed several Australian flags instead of British ones ahead of King Charles’ visit. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047858301480685728/photo/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺A single Kalibr is enroute north to Brovary, Kyiv region. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Intercepted, Ukrainian airspace is all clear of missiles. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺The missiles are flying north east over Bila Tservka area. Several have either been intercepted or struck a target in the Cherkasy region. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 A single Kalibr is enroute north to Brovary, Kyiv region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺导弹正向东北方向飞越白采尔科韦地区。其中几枚已被拦截或击中了切尔卡瑟地区的目标。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 一枚“口径”巡航导弹正向北飞往基辅州布罗瓦里。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺The majority of the Kalibr missile groups have continued north from the Cherkasy region onto the Kyiv region and likely onto the Chernihiv region. They will most likely target Nizhyn, which was previously targeted this evening. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 The missiles are flying north east over Bila Tservka area. Several have either been intercepted or struck a target in the Cherkasy region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺大部分“口径”导弹群已从切尔卡瑟地区继续向北飞往基辅州，并可能飞往切尔尼戈夫州。它们极有可能以今晚早些时候曾遭袭击的涅任为目标。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 导弹正向东北方向飞越白采尔科韦地区。其中几枚已被拦截或击中了切尔卡瑟地区的目标。@wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Southern Command (SOUTHCOM) has announced that, under orders from SOUTHCOM Commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force - Southern Spear (JTF-SS) conducted a lethal kinetic strike Friday against on a vessel operated by a Designated Terrorist Organizations operating in the Eastern Pacific. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations, with two alleged male narco-terrorists killed during this action by SOUTHCOM. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国南方司令部（SOUTHCOM）宣布，根据南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万将军的命令，南方之矛联合特遣部队（JTF-SS）周五对一艘由在东太平洋活动的指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了致命的动能打击。情报证实，该船只正沿已知的毒品走私路线航行并从事毒品走私活动，南方司令部在此次行动中击毙了两名涉嫌男性毒品恐怖分子。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Several Kalibrs have been intercepted so far. If my memory serves me correctly western Cherkasy and southeastern Vinnytsia region has seen many successful interceptions from Ukrainian F-16s/Mirage 2000s. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 The majority of the Kalibr missile groups have continued north from the Cherkasy region onto the Kyiv region and likely onto the Chernihiv region. They will most likely target Nizhyn, which was previously targeted this evening. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺目前已拦截数枚“口径”巡航导弹。如果我没记错的话，切尔卡瑟西部和文尼察州东南部已经见证了乌克兰F-16/幻影2000战机多次成功的拦截行动。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 大部分“口径”导弹群已从切尔卡瑟州继续向北飞往基辅州，并可能飞往切尔尼戈夫州。它们极有可能以今晚早些时候曾遭袭击的涅任为目标。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺A U.S. Navy MQ-4C has been registered flying around Cuba for several hours again this Tuesday. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 U.S. Surviellance of Cuba continues this Friday evening as a U.S. Navy P-8 has been flying around the island for several hours now. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺一架美国海军MQ-4C无人机本周二再次被记录到在古巴周边飞行了数小时。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 本周五晚，美国对古巴的监视仍在继续，一架美国海军P-8巡逻机已经在该岛周边飞行了数小时。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺The majority of the initial Kalibr groups now appear to be circling back to the Kirovohrad region from the Cherkasy and Vinnystia regions. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Several Kalibrs have been intercepted so far. If my memory serves me correctly western Cherkasy and southeastern Vinnytsia region has seen many successful interceptions from Ukrainian F-16s/Mirage 2000s. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺最初的大部分“口径”巡航导弹群现在似乎正从切尔卡瑟和文尼察地区折返至基洛夫格勒地区。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 到目前为止，已有数枚“口径”导弹被拦截。如果我没记错的话，切尔卡瑟西部和文尼察东南部地区已经见证了乌克兰 F-16/幻影 2000 战机多次成功的拦截行动。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Three new Kalibr missile groups have also been detected entering Ukrainian air space through the Kherson region. (it is also likely that the other missiles are Kalibrs rather Kh-101s thanks to insights by a Kiwian monitor 📝) @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 The majority of the initial Kalibr groups now appear to be circling back to the Kirovohrad region from the Cherkasy and Vinnystia regions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺另有三组新的“口径”导弹群被探测到经赫尔松地区进入乌克兰领空。（多亏了一位新西兰监测员的见解，其他导弹也更有可能是“口径”而非 Kh-101 📝）@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 最初的大部分“口径”导弹群现在似乎正从切尔卡瑟和文尼察地区折返至基洛夫格勒地区。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor X is reportedly cracking down on spam accounts, which includes suspending monetization for accounts that meet that criteria. Some aren’t taking it well 😄 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047842566922481729/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 据报道，WarMonitor X 正在打击垃圾账号，包括暂停符合该标准的账号的获利功能。有些人对此反应强烈 😄 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047842566922481729/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Some of the missile groups appear to be angling north or continuing along that trajectory and will enter the Haisyn area of the Vinnystia region. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Three new Kalibr missile groups have also been detected entering Ukrainian air space through the Kherson region. (it is also likely that the other missiles are Kalibrs rather Kh-101s thanks to insights by a Kiwian monitor 📝 ) @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺部分导弹群似乎正向北转向或沿该轨迹继续飞行，并将进入文尼察地区的海辛（Haisyn）区域。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 另有三组新的“口径”导弹群被探测到经赫尔松地区进入乌克兰领空。（多亏了一位新西兰监测员的见解，其他导弹也更有可能是“口径”而非 Kh-101 📝）@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺The missiles have turned west, flying towards Ananive in the north of the Odessa region, changing their northwesterly course. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Some of the missile groups appear to be angling north or continuing along that trajectory and will enter the Haisyn area of the Vinnystia region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺导弹已转向西，飞往敖德萨州北部的阿纳尼耶夫，改变了其西北方向的航线。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 部分导弹群似乎正在向北转向或继续沿该轨迹飞行，并将进入文尼察州的盖辛地区。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Two more groups have been detected in Ukrainian airspace, bringing the total to 25 Kh-101s. Currently the missiles have been flying north from Kherson region through the Mykolaiv region to the Kirovohrad region to the Cherkasy and Vinnystia regions.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 The missiles have turned west, flying towards Ananive in the north of the Odessa region, changing their northwesterly course. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺在乌克兰领空又探测到两组导弹，总数达到25枚Kh-101。目前导弹正从赫尔松州向北飞越尼古拉耶夫州，前往基洛夫格勒州，再到切尔卡瑟州和文尼察州……” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 导弹已转向西，飞往敖德萨州北部的阿纳尼耶夫，改变了其西北方向的航线。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Southern Command says it carried out a strike on a vessel in the eastern Pacific suspected of narcotics trafficking, killing two. The military said no U.S. personnel were injured. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国南方司令部表示，其在东太平洋对一艘涉嫌贩毒的船只进行了打击，造成两人死亡。军方称没有美方人员受伤。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Six groups of Russian Kh-101s have entered Ukraine from the south over the Kherson region. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Two more groups have been detected in Ukrainian airspace, bringing the total to 25 Kh-101s. Currently the missiles have been flying north from Kherson region through the Mykolaiv region to the Kirovohrad region to the Cherkasy and Vinnystia regions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺六组俄罗斯 Kh-101 导弹已从南部赫尔松地区进入乌克兰。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰领空又探测到两组导弹，总数达到 25 枚 Kh-101。目前导弹正从赫尔松地区向北飞行，途经尼古拉耶夫地区，前往基洛夫格勒地区，再到切尔卡瑟和文尼察地区。@wfwitness

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Rafael Peralta (DDG 115) enforces the U.S. blockade on Iranian ports against an Iranian-flagged ship attempting to sail to a port in Iran, April 24. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047839041182130273/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部导弹驱逐舰“拉斐尔·佩拉尔塔”号（DDG 115）于 4 月 24 日执行美国对伊朗港口的封锁，拦截了一艘试图驶往伊朗港口的伊朗籍船只。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047839041182130273/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Italian Army Ariete MBTs charging through a French town during the ongoing exercise Orion 26, one of Europe’s largest war games since the end of the Cold War. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047838533625295144/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 意大利陆军“公羊”主战坦克在正在进行的“猎户座 26”演习期间穿过法国城镇，这是冷战结束以来欧洲最大的战争游戏之一。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047838533625295144/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇲 🇹🇷 New York City Mayor Mamdani on Armenian genocide: Today marks the 111th anniversary of the Armenian Genocide. As we honor the 1.5 million Armenians murdered by the Ottoman Empire across modern-day Turkey, Syria, and Armenia, we must refuse to let history repeat itself. In 2020, the military forces of Azerbaijan and Turkey attacked the Armenian population in Nagorno-Karabakh. In 2023, Azerbaijan expelled over 100,000 Armenians from Nagorno-Karabakh, continuing the genocidal campaign that had begun over 100 years prior. On this day of remembrance, we reaffirm the right of the Armenian people — and all people — to freedom, safety, and self-determination. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇲 🇹🇷 纽约市市长曼达尼谈亚美尼亚种族灭绝：今天是亚美尼亚种族灭绝 111 周年纪念日。在纪念奥斯曼帝国在现代土耳其、叙利亚和亚美尼亚境内屠杀的 150 万亚美尼亚人的同时，我们必须拒绝让历史重演。2020 年，阿塞拜疆和土耳其的军事力量袭击了纳戈尔诺-卡拉巴赫的亚美尼亚人口。2023 年，阿塞拜疆将超过 10 万名亚美尼亚人从纳戈尔诺-卡拉巴赫驱逐出境，延续了 100 多年前开始的种族灭绝运动。在这个纪念日，我们重申亚美尼亚人民——以及所有人民——享有自由、安全和自决的权利。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Putin’s approval rating has dropped for the seventh straight week to 65.6%, its lowest since the 2022 invasion of Ukraine, according to state polling. (Sky) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047826749371580710/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 根据国家民意调查，普京的支持率连续第七周下降至 65.6%，为 2022 年入侵乌克兰以来的最低水平。（天空新闻）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047826749371580710/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇻🇪🇨🇴Acting Venezuelan President Rodriguez announcd that Venezuela and Colombia are working on eletrical grid and gas insfrastructure interconnection. "On the other hand, we have also talked about the electrical interconnection for the West of Venezuela…" ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇨🇴 Colombian President Petro annound that he and acting Venezuelan President Rodriguez discuss joint efforts to combat cartel and criminal networks operating along their border. "To begin, in particular, as we have discussed today, with a liberation of the peoples. To set up a common, coordinated effort to liberate the peoples from the borders of the mafias. Dedicated to various illegal economies, starting with cocaine, illicit gold, human trafficking and other types of rare minerals, etc. In such a way that the border is only for the people. The Colombian people, the Venezuelan people. The border cannot belong to anyone other than the peoples." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇻🇪🇨🇴委内瑞拉代理总统罗德里格斯宣布，委内瑞拉和哥伦比亚正在致力于电网和天然气基础设施的互联互通。“另一方面，我们也讨论了委内瑞拉西部的电力互联问题……” ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇨🇴 哥伦比亚总统佩特罗宣布，他与委内瑞拉代理总统罗德里格斯讨论了共同打击在两国边境活动的卡特尔和犯罪网络的努力。“首先，正如我们今天所讨论的那样，要从解放人民开始。建立一种共同的、协调一致的努力，将人民从黑手党的边境中解放出来。致力于各种非法经济，从可卡因、非法黄金、人口贩运和其他类型的稀有矿产等开始。这样一来，边境就只属于人民。哥伦比亚人民，委内瑞拉人民。边境不能属于除人民以外的任何人。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇱 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 Poland says it has activated air force and allied aircraft in its airspace in response to Russian aerial attacks on Ukraine, raising air defense readiness and deploying fighter jets and surveillance assets. The measures are described as preventive to secure Polish airspace near affected areas. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇱 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 波兰表示，为应对俄罗斯对乌克兰的空中袭击，已激活其领空内的空军和盟军飞机，提高了防空戒备状态，并部署了战斗机和监视资产。这些措施被描述为旨在确保受影响地区附近波兰领空安全的预防性措施。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor The DOJ is reviewing hundreds of naturalized Americans for potential citizenship revocation as the Trump administration expands denaturalization efforts. It’s unclear why those individuals were selected. (NBC) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047825661977317776/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Unusual activity by U.S. Strategic Command (STRATCOM) continues Friday, with a rare 21-character Emergency Action Message (EAM) being broadcast earlier by the Air Force over HFGCS. 🚨 BREAKING: A very rare 21 character EAM just went out over the HFGCS! https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2047786951596507326/video/1 - NEET INTEL tweet

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Department of the Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) announced a new round of sanctions Friday targeting the Iranian Oil Trade and Shadow Fleet, levying sanctions against the China-based independent teapot refinery Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Refinery Co., Ltd., along with 19 tankers and a number of crypto wallets utilized by the Central Bank of Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国财政部外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）周五宣布了新一轮制裁，针对伊朗石油贸易和“影子船队”，对总部位于中国的独立茶壶炼油厂恒力石化（大连）炼油有限公司，以及19艘油轮和伊朗中央银行使用的一些加密货币钱包实施了制裁。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇨🇴 Acting Venezuelan President Rodriguez announcd that Venezuela and Colombia are working on eletrical grid and gas insfrastructure interconnection. "On the other hand, we have also talked about the electrical interconnection for the West of Venezuela, which is such a priority at this moment, as the West of the country knows, but also the Venezuelan people, who suffer from what has been the process of disinvestment in the national electrical system, as a result of sanctions that have directly affected the supply of maintenance supplies to our national electrical system. So, the electrical interconnection is already a step forward, and also the gasification interconnection, where we can not only bring gas to Colombia, but we can also export gas to other countries. So, the electrical interconnection and the gasification interconnection are also part of the approach that we have taken at this moment." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇨🇴 委内瑞拉代理总统罗德里格斯宣布，委内瑞拉和哥伦比亚正在致力于电网和天然气基础设施的互联互通。“另一方面，我们也谈到了委内瑞拉西部的电力互联，这在目前是一个优先事项，正如该国西部所知，委内瑞拉人民也深知这一点，他们遭受了国家电力系统投资不足的过程，这是制裁直接影响了我们国家电力系统维护物资供应的结果。因此，电力互联已经向前迈进了一步，还有气化互联，我们不仅可以将天然气输送到哥伦比亚，还可以将天然气出口到其他国家。因此，电力互联和气化互联也是我们目前采取的方法的一部分。” @wfwitness
